content.en:
"I'll have to collect some more resources in the future!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

With his current strength, it would not be too slow to collect resources, after all, he would soon be able to reach the half-step Eternal Realm level of the Four Extremes Realm, and in the Source Sea, the half-step Eternal Realm powerhouses above the Four Extremes Realm were extremely rare, and there would be no more than fifteen people.

Coupled with his life-saving ability, it can be said that in the Source Sea, he is almost not afraid of anyone, and no one can kill him, unless there is an eternal realm coming from the space-time territory.

In the following years, Ye Tian worked hard to improve his cultivation, enhance his understanding of the innate eternal rules, and at the same time, he was also cultivating the world of will.

Among the hundreds of thousands of Tribulations that came out of the Traceless Territory, Ye Tian had not made much progress in the Will World, after all, without the assistance of a treasure land like Rift Wind Valley, and after the Will World stepped into the second order, it would be difficult to improve his will.

And it is very difficult to improve the will, and it is very slow to open up the world of will, and if the will is not improved in the later stage, it will not be possible to continue to open up the world of will.

Now, although Ye Tian's will world far exceeds 1,000 and has reached 5,289 will worlds, if he wants to break through 10,000 will worlds, it is far away, and only when he reaches 10,000 will worlds can he be promoted to a third-order will world and usher in another will transformation.

But no matter what, Ye Tian's will is still slowly improving, this is the improvement brought by the secret technique of the will world, before reaching the bottleneck, his will will not stagnate, but will become slower and slower.

Another long period of time had passed, and Ye Tian's cultivation had improved a lot, and he had passed the rapid ascension period of the half-step Eternal Realm.

At this time, his combat power had improved a lot, and he had already reached the level of the Four Extremes Realm and the Half-Step Eternal Realm.

It can be said that he is now the top combat power of the entire Source Sea, above the other twelve ancestors of the Source God Pavilion, if he shows his strength, it is enough to become the first ancestor among the thirteen ancestors.

It doesn't make much sense, though.

-------------------

Source Sea, True Pole Palace.

Zhenji Palace is one of the top big forces in the Source Sea, even much stronger than a loose force like the Source God Pavilion, but it is very low-key, and does not accept ordinary disciples, so there are not many people, but each of them is the elite of the elite, the demon of the evil.

There are nine in the Extreme Realm alone, more than the Source Godhead, and the most important thing is quality.

The True Pole Palace had a Four-Pole Realm half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse, while the Source God Pavilion did not have a Four-Pole Realm before Ye Tian, not even a Second-Pole Realm.

Therefore, the True Pole Palace is much more powerful than the Source God Pavilion.

Moreover, the True Pole Palace is extremely united, and it is a real force, not an idle force.

At this time, the palace master of the True Extreme Palace, the Qing Ying Holy Ancestor of the Four Extremes Realm half-step Eternal Realm level, was entertaining three guests.

"Qiyuan Origin Ancestor, Wind Spirit Origin Ancestor, Five Dragon Origin Ancestor, the three of you have descended to my True Extreme Palace, could it be that the Lord of the North Sea has any orders?"

The Blue Immortal Saint Ancestor asked.

The Lord of the North Sea in his mouth is the Eternal Realm that he is loyal to, and the Lord of the North Sea is actually the former Palace Master of the True Pole Palace, after breaking through to the Eternal Realm, he left the Source Sea, occupied a time and space lord, opened up the North Sea Territory, and became the Lord of the North Sea.

But Shingoku Palace has been serving the Lord of the North Sea, gathering intelligence and transporting talents.

However, there are not many geniuses born in the True Pole Palace, and they are much worse than the North Sea Territory, so the North Sea Lord doesn't care much about the True Pole Palace, and rarely sends people.

But this time, three people from the Four Extremes Realm were dispatched, which shows that the task is not simple.

Qiyuan Origin Ancestor said solemnly: "Qing Ying Holy Ancestor, the Lord of the North Sea sent us here is about the opportunity of 100,000 eternal years!"

"A chance for 100,000 eternal years?"

The Qing Ying Saint Ancestor was stunned for a moment, but immediately reacted to what the Qi Yuan Yuan Ancestor said.

Eternal years are a unit used by the Eternal Realm to calculate time, an eternal year is equivalent to a million eons, and 100,000 eternal years is such a long time.

Even his Blue Immortal Saint Ancestor has not yet passed the age of 100,000 eternal years, and it is only the age of 70,000 or 80,000 eternal years, and this is already an incomparably large age.

The era when he was born can be called the beginning of the source sea, the source sea resources are very large, and various rare resources have been born one after another.

But for the Eternal Realm, seventy or eighty thousand eternal years ago, it was just the beginning of the reincarnation of the Source Sea, and when the next reincarnation began, the resources of the Source Sea would explode again, just like the scene at the beginning of the Source Sea.

And how many eternal years the source sea has really existed, no one is very clear.

Although the Blue Immortal Saint Ancestor was not born 100,000 years ago, he had also heard of a secret, that is, every 100,000 eternal years, the Source Sea would give birth to an amazing opportunity, and even cause a fight in the Eternal Realm.

The last time 100,000 years ago, many eternal realms fought, the entire source sea was in ruins, after many years, the source sea regained its vitality, and ushered in a large explosion of resources, by the later generations of cultivators named the beginning of the source sea era, also means the new life of the source sea.

In fact, before the 100,000 Eternal Years, the Eternal Realm often appeared in the Source Sea, but since that great war, the Lords Alliance issued an order that the Eternal Realm is not allowed to reside in the Source Sea, and even if something goes to the Source Sea, it must not stay for too long, just to prevent similar things from happening.

After all, the Space-Time Lord is attached to the Source Sea, and they don't want any problems with the Source Sea.

Once something goes wrong with the source sea, the countless space-time lords will also cease to exist.

"Three, the Lord of the North Sea asked you to come and find that great opportunity?" asked the Blue Immortal Saint Ancestor.

"Yes!"

Qiyuan Yuanzu nodded: "The Lord of the North Sea asked us to investigate, and the True Pole Palace must also go all out, once we investigate the location of the opportunity and the time of its birth, we will immediately notify the Lord of the North Sea, and then the Lord of the North Sea will personally descend on the Source Sea." "

"I know, I'll fully cooperate with the three of you!"

The Green Immortal Saint Ancestor responded.

Similar things were playing out one force after another, and many Eternal Realms had sent half-step Eternal Realm powerhouses at the Extreme Realm level to descend on the Source Sea.

Such news can't be concealed at all, and the Source God Pavilion also knows about this news.

And so.

The True River Sword Ancestor summoned the Thirteen Ancestors and started a meeting.

And after Ye Tian got the news, he immediately sent the copy body to the Source God Pavilion.
